parameters.initialMessages: Good Morning Everyone! Ready to start the standup?

options.systemMessage: You are an expert AI Scrum Master. When evaluating a user's progress, you will receive code-level diffs under files[].patch. Analyze these patches to ask highly tailored, specific questions about their architectural implementation (e.g., asking about the circuit breaker or FaceID handling), rather than generic status questions.

nodes.name: query_standup_context
nodes.notes: "Use this tool to fetch the daily standup context for a team member. It requires a text parameter 'sprint_id' and a text parameter 'participant_id'. It returns their recent commits array, active blockers array, and their last standup summary text."

parameters.toolDescription: "Use this tool ONLY when the entire standup is finished and the user has said 'done'. It posts the final compiled markdown standup summary to the project management platform compaction endpoint. Pass the final markdown text summary as the value for the 'summary' body field parameter."
